title: A computational method to aid the design and analysis of single cell RNA-seq experiments for cell type identification.
author: Abrams D Kumar P Karuturi RKM George J
content:
S-EPMC6551246 PMC6551246 A computational method to aid the design and analysis of single cell RNA-seq experiments for cell type identification.

Background

The advent of single cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) enabled researchers to study transcriptomic activity within individual cells
